records.question: What cinemas named Mount Callan in County Clare with a capacity of exactly 908 show at least 5 daily screenings of The Case of the Bermuda Triangle, directed by Jesus Salvador Treviño, which aired in 1992 and is number 4 in its season?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE film.original_air_date LIKE '%1992%' AND film.title = 'The Case of the Bermuda Triangle' AND cinema.capacity = 908 AND cinema.location = 'County Clare' AND schedule.show_times_per_day >= 5 AND film.number_in_season = 4 AND film.directed_by = 'Jesus Salvador Treviño' AND cinema.name = 'Mount Callan'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT cinema.Cinema_ID
FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.Cinema_ID = schedule.Cinema_ID
JOIN film ON schedule.Film_ID = film.Film_ID
WHERE cinema.Name = 'Mount Callan'
  AND cinema.Location = 'County Clare'
  AND cinema.Capacity = 908
  AND schedule.Show_times_per_day >= 5
  AND film.Title = 'The Case of the Bermuda Triangle'
  AND film.Directed_by = 'Jesus Salvador Treviño'
  AND film.Number_in_season = 4
  AND substr(film.Original_air_date, 1, 4) = '1992'
